name: @ai-canvas/desktop
description: Local-first scene-first mockup editor desktop app.
author: Nick Chadwick

scripts.dist:mac: pnpm --dir ../.. build:packages && pnpm build:app && DESKTOP_TARGET=mac node ./scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs
scripts.dist:mac:unsigned: pnpm --dir ../.. build:packages && pnpm build:app && DESKTOP_TARGET=mac DESKTOP_UNSIGNED=true node ./scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs
scripts.dist:linux: pnpm --dir ../.. build:packages && pnpm build:app && DESKTOP_TARGET=linux node ./scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs
scripts.dist:linux:x64: pnpm --dir ../.. build:packages && pnpm build:app && DESKTOP_TARGET=linux DESKTOP_ARCH=x64 node ./scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs
scripts.dist:linux:arm64: pnpm --dir ../.. build:packages && pnpm build:app && DESKTOP_TARGET=linux DESKTOP_ARCH=arm64 node ./scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs
